calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-23-2010 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-22-2010 Continued To Nov-23-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Gottschalk for Robert Horning (Administrator).

The Court directed Counsel to send notice to the Decedent's Estate Section of the Franchise Tax Board. The matter was continued to November 23, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-01-2010 Continued To Sep-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

By Claimant To Determine Ownership Of Estate Property, And Order Auth. And Directing Transfer Of Real Property To Petitioner
Off Calendar Oct-21-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for and with Byron Lee. Robert Gottschalk for and with Robert Hornung.

Ms. Young informed the Court that the Parties had arrived at a settlement. The Court directed the Parties to file a Petition For Approval Of The Settlement and that it could be filed by way of an ex parte petition. The matter was taken off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy B. Mann.

By Claimant To Determine Ownership Of Estate Property, And Order Auth. And Directing Transfer Of Real Property To Petitioner
Off Calendar Oct-07-2008 Continued To Oct-21-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order
